overall.description: A cinematic night flight through a futuristic cyberpunk city canyon from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves smoothly between towering skyscrapers adorned with bright neon holographic advertisements and digital billboards, with flying vehicles visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk city canyon between corporate towers

agents.ego_description: smoothly piloting a flying vehicle through the narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall vertical displays featuring a blue-haired woman with glowing eyes
large digital billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with product advertisements
large glowing green humanoid hologram walking in place on building facade
multi-lane wet asphalt street with yellow dividing lines visible far below
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers fading into the hazy night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-angle view looking down a futuristic city canyon at night. Bright holographic billboards featuring a blue-haired woman cover the left building, while a large green holographic figure and 'EL GUAPO' advertisements dominate the right. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow space between the towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep city canyon with distant aerial traffic

events.description: flying vehicle becomes visible in the distance between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing flight through the canyon with distant flying traffic now visible ahead

notable_agents.action: flying car moving through the city canyon in the distance

entered.detail: small aerial vehicle with lights visible between the distant towers

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances through the canyon, the left-side holographic billboards pass out of view behind the camera. A flying vehicle becomes visible in the hazy distance between the towers, indicating light aerial traffic. The street below becomes more prominent as the camera descends slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching city intersection with prominent holograms

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady forward flight with the green holographic figure now much closer on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its forward trajectory through the city canyon. The large green holographic figure on the right building looms closer and larger in the frame. The street below is now clearly visible with traffic lights and road markings, as the camera approaches the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a neon-lit cyberpunk canyon that gradually descends toward the city streets below. It begins with a high-angle perspective, moving steadily between towering skyscrapers adorned with vivid holographic billboards of a blue-haired woman on the left and green figures with El Guapo advertisements on the right. As the camera advances, these towering displays slide behind the field of view, opening up the vista to reveal a flying vehicle drifting through the hazy distance. The scene then shifts as the camera descends slightly, bringing the glowing activity of the street level into sharper prominence.

The shot follows a continuous forward trajectory through a neon-lit city canyon that gradually descends toward the detailed urban grid below. It begins by gliding deep into the architectural chasm, where a massive green holographic figure on the right looms larger and more imposing as the camera draws near. As the flight continues, the perspective shifts downward, revealing the street level in increasing clarity. The scene then opens up to expose the intricate patterns of road markings and the glow of traffic lights before the camera aligns with the approaching intersection ahead.
